creator: jochen@winteltosh.de
text:
The pfSense community suggested that I needed to reproduce the problem with stock FreeBSD since it might be a driver error that cannot get fixed by pfSense community but FreeBSD.

I tried several attempts to provoke the error. The error message did not occur every single time.
I reconfigured the NIC several times with either command line or rc.conf.

I don't know which commands pfSense invokes when I change VLAN settings via GUI.
So that might be the reason why it actually crashes while FreeBSD only gives an error message.

Tell me if you need any more input. I might also be able to give you access to my test machine with the NIC inside but not before second week in January.
